subject: LU-18155 ptlrpc: use LASSERT/F instead of if () LBUG()

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Yep its inverted!!!

Oops. I originally had this use LBUG_ON(), since that's closer to the kernel's semantics. But I figured LASSERT() would be more accepted. But never inverted the logic to match.

I manually fixed the logic on all of the patches. And removed 'trivial', just in case.
